name: char-linyuan
desc: Chinese male, 28 years old, short clean black hair, no glasses. Square jawline, sharp eyebrows, clear facial features, slight confident smirk. Wearing a plain dark blue crew-neck sweatshirt (no logo, no pattern), black casual pants, white sneakers. Medium-slim build, 175cm. Full body standing portrait. Genshin Impact 3D anime art style, game character portrait, soft cel-shading, detailed facial features. Bright natural lighting.

name: scene-coworking-day
desc: Bright co-working space, about 50sqm shared area. White long tables with MacBooks, coffee cups, sticky notes. Large floor-to-ceiling windows showing city skyline, clear blue sky with white clouds. Green plants scattered around. Morning 10AM natural sunlight flooding in, warm-white tone, bright and airy. No artificial colored lighting, no neon. Genshin Impact 3D anime environment art style, clean modern interior.
